positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical hot air balloon floating over rolling hills at sunrise. The balloon should be filled with a complex geometric pattern in pastel teal and burnt orange, contrasting sharply against a smooth, gradient sky backdrop. Below the balloon, the hills are represented by simple, interconnected curved lines and silhouettes of stylized trees and geometric flora. The composition must be centrally balanced, featuring clean lines and strong positive space. Style: Flat graphic illustration, vector art aesthetic, inspired by mid-century modern design. Color palette: Muted pastels (teal, blush pink, burnt orange, soft yellow). Composition: Symmetry and contrast. Lighting: Soft, directional sunrise light emphasizing silhouettes and clean edges. Suitable for seamless apparel printing.
